hero.subtitle: Stop winging the agenda. 1on1 guides every session with structured questions, AI analysis, and concrete action items.

heroCard.name: Sarah Chen
heroCard.sentimentBlurb: Strong engagement on career growth goals

wizard.title: The Guided Session
wizard.description: Four structured steps that ensure no vital topic is ever left unaddressed.
wizard.question: How would you rate your work-life balance this week?

ai.title: AI Suggestions
ai.description: Real-time coaching that turns subtle signals into productive conversations.
ai.suggestion1Desc: Suggest Sarah leads the API migration — a natural step toward Staff Engineer.
ai.suggestion1Reasoning: Sarah mentioned interest in tech lead path in last 3 sessions
ai.suggestion2Desc: Review workload and redistribute non-critical tasks.
ai.suggestion2Reasoning: Workload satisfaction score dropped from 4.2 to 3.1

dashboard.title: Team Dashboard
dashboard.description: Real-time visibility into team health across all reporting lines.
dashboard.alertText: Score drop detected for Jamie Park

features.title: Features built for human connection
features.subtitle: We've removed the technical friction so you can focus on the person across the screen.

guided.title: Guided, not blank
guided.description: Dynamic templates that adapt automatically to the history of your previous sessions.

ai.title: AI that coaches
ai.description: Passive listener that identifies patterns and suggests growth opportunities for your team.

actionItems.title: Action items with teeth
actionItems.description: Integrated tracking that follows up on every promise made during the session.

security.title: Your data, your rules
security.description: End-to-end encryption with the ability to self-host for complete data sovereignty.

teamHealth.title: Team health at a glance
teamHealth.description: Aggregated metrics that help you spot systemic issues before they lead to churn.

aiAssistant.title: AI assistant for forms
aiAssistant.description: A specialized AI helps you build and optimize your session wizard forms, tailored to your team's needs.

step1.title: Set up
step1.description: Add your team and set the cadence. Choose from expert-crafted templates or create your own.

step2.title: Run sessions
step2.description: Follow the guided agenda and take notes with real-time AI assistance.

step3.title: Track results
step3.description: Analyze trends and follow up on action items generated from every session.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing for every scale
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your leadership style.

q1.question: How secure is my data?
q1.answer: We use end-to-end encryption for all meeting notes. For high-compliance environments, our Enterprise tier allows you to host the entire stack on your own servers.

q2.question: Can I self-host the open-source version?
q2.answer: Yes, our core engine is open source on GitHub. Enterprise users get priority support and Docker containers optimized for production environments.

q3.question: How does AI analysis work?
q3.answer: Our AI analyzes responses and linguistic markers to detect shifts in morale over time, alerting you to potential burnout before it happens.

finalCta.title: Ready to improve your team health?
finalCta.subtitle: Join managers who build better teams through structured conversations.

footer.tagline: The open-source platform for structured one-on-one meetings.
